methods.name: CalcMatrix2GroundView
methods.signature: CalcMatrix2GroundView( inputPolyhedron: Polyhedron3D, faceIndex: int ) -> tuple[eGeometryErrorCode, Matrix3D]
methods.summary: Calculates the 3DMatrix that is neccessary to project the Face of a polyhedron onto a groundview. It considers the orientation of the normalvector. so the bottom face of a cuboid has different matrix then the top face (turnd 180) Function is token from old Allplan classic Geomatry calculations
methods.remarks: Calculates the 3DMatrix that is neccessary to project the Face of a polyhedron onto a groundview. It considers the orientation of the normalvector. so the bottom face of a cuboid has different matrix then the top face (turnd 180) Function is token from old Allplan classic Geomatry calculations

params.name: inputPolyhedron
params.doc: The Polyhedron with the requested face

params.name: faceIndex
params.doc: The faceindex we that has to be projected into Groundview

returns.doc: tuple(Ok or Error, The resul tmatrix. Calc the coords of the poyhedron with that matrix and you get the projection to groundview so that the requested face is complanar to Ground view)

methods.name: GetFacePoints
methods.signature: GetFacePoints( elem: Polyhedron3D, face: PolyhedronFace ) -> tuple[bool, VecSizeTList, Point3DList]
methods.summary: Get the points of a polyhedron face
methods.remarks: Get the points of a polyhedron face

params.name: elem
params.doc: Get the points from this polyhedron

params.name: face
params.doc: Get the points from this face

returns.doc: tuple(true, if the extraction went well, Vertices of the faces points, Resulting points)

methods.name: GetNextEdge
methods.signature: GetNextEdge( elem: Polyhedron3D, face: PolyhedronFace ) -> tuple[bool, VecSizeTList, Point3DList] | GetNextEdge( elem: Polyhedron3D, edges: GeometryEdgeList, verticeHandle: int ) -> tuple[bool, VecSizeTList, Point3DList]

params.name: elem
params.doc: Get the vertices for a face of this polyhedron

params.name: face
params.doc: Get the vertices of this face

returns.doc: tuple(true if returned values are valid, Vertices of the already added faces points, Already added faces points)

methods.name: ReorderPolyhedronFaces
methods.signature: ReorderPolyhedronFaces( polyhedron: Polyhedron3D, bottomPlane: Plane3D, topPlane: Plane3D ) | ReorderPolyhedronFaces(polyhedron: Polyhedron3D, direction: Vector3D)
methods.summary: Reorder polyhedron faces according to planes. Reorders given polyhedron faces according to planes. The face laying in bottomPlane goes first and face laying in topPlane goes second. Order of other faces is not guaranteed. Old interface: normalizeArchitectural3d
methods.remarks: Reorder polyhedron faces according to planes. Reorders given polyhedron faces according to planes. The face laying in bottomPlane goes first and face laying in topPlane goes second. Order of other faces is not guaranteed. Old interface: normalizeArchitectural3d
